system.powerDescription:
You and up to 1/2 CAT allies of your choice are now able to flow your flesh like water. You all gain the following benefits: 

• Any attack reliant on piercing or slashing you does -1 stress. 
• You are able to liquify, slipping through cracks as small as your fingers with ease. 
• You can completely collapse into a puddle, remaining ambulatory even in this state. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may easily alter the parameters of a roll whilst active.
